sentences.arabic: أَصْبَحَ صُنَّاعُ الْمُحْتَوَى يَنْشُرُونَ مَقَاطِعَ فِيدْيُو مُفِيدَةً.
sentences.translation: Kreatori sadržaja su počeli objavljivati korisne video snimke.
sentences.translationEn: Content creators have started publishing useful video clips.

sentences.arabic: يَتَعَلَّمُ النَّاسُ مَهَارَاتٍ جَدِيدَةً مِثْلَ الطَّبْخِ وَاللُّغَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi uče nove vještine poput kuhanja i jezika.
sentences.translationEn: People learn new skills such as cooking and languages.

sentences.arabic: يُتَابِعُ الْمَلَايِينُ هَؤُلَاءِ الْمُبْدِعِينَ بِسَبَبِ أَفْكَارِهِمُ الْجَمِيلَةِ.
sentences.translation: Milioni prate ove kreativce zbog njihovih lijepih ideja.
sentences.translationEn: Millions follow these creators because of their beautiful ideas.
